intro: Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum) is Kerala's capital and a growing IT destination, home to the Technopark cluster — one of India's largest IT parks. ShiftIndia's 320+ verified vendors cover all localities.
whyUs: Thiruvananthapuram's hilly roads and monsoon-heavy climate require specially equipped vehicles and waterproof packing. Our vendors are prepared for Kerala's weather year-round.

faqs.q: Do you cover Technopark and Kazhakuttam?
faqs.a: Yes — IT corridors including Technopark, Technocity and Kazhakuttam are fully covered.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Trivandrum?
Do you use waterproof packing for monsoon season?
faqs.a: Yes, all our Kerala vendors use weather-resistant packing materials as standard.
